hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【WORLD】伊朗战争实时更新：以色列誓言夺取黎巴嫩更多领土，袭击伊朗港口；【CRYPTO】由于通胀担忧和地缘政治重塑美联储预期，市场转向加息定价；【FINANCE】人工智能论文震撼整个股市的研究公司再次发出重大呼吁。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Israel Vows to Seize More Territory in Lebanon, and Strikes Hit Iranian Port
items.summary: Israel said it launched a wave of strikes targeting infrastructure in Tehran and other areas, and Iran retaliated. The speaker of Iran’s parliament accused the Trump administration of engaging in a front of diplomacy while “secretly planning a ground invasion.”
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：以色列誓言夺取黎巴嫩更多领土，袭击伊朗港口
items.summary_zh: 以色列表示，它对德黑兰和其他地区的基础设施发动了一波袭击，伊朗进行了报复。伊朗议会议长指责特朗普政府一边打着外交幌子，一边“秘密策划地面入侵”。

items.title: Markets move to price in rate hikes as inflation fears and geopolitics reshape Fed expectations
items.summary: Middle East tensions have driven divergences across asset markets as oil stays elevated and traditional safe havens falter.
items.title_zh: 由于通胀担忧和地缘政治重塑美联储预期，市场转向加息定价
items.summary_zh: 中东紧张局势加剧了资产市场的分歧，油价持续走高，传统避险资产岌岌可危。

items.title: The research firm whose AI paper knocked the whole stock market is out with another big call
items.summary: Citrini Research said persistently high energy prices risk weighing on consumers and corporate earnings, creating a tough backdrop for equities.
items.title_zh: 人工智能论文震撼整个股市的研究公司再次发出重大呼吁
items.summary_zh: Citrini Research 表示，持续居高不下的能源价格可能会给消费者和企业盈利带来压力，给股市带来艰难的背景。

items.title: Private credit's cracks open door for Wall Street banks' comeback: 'The tug of war is just starting'
items.summary: Wall Street banks may finally be getting a long-awaited opening to claw back market share from private credit lenders.
items.title_zh: 私人信贷为华尔街银行卷土重来打开了大门：“拉锯战才刚刚开始”
items.summary_zh: 华尔街银行可能终于获得了期待已久的机会，可以从私人信贷机构手中夺回市场份额。

items.title: Sen. Warren rips Federal Reserve chair pick Kevin Warsh: 'You have learned nothing from your failures'
items.summary: Kevin Warsh's nomination as chair of the Federal Reserve has been in limbo because of a criminal investigation of Chair Jerome Powell.
items.title_zh: 参议员沃伦痛批美联储主席人选凯文·沃什：“你没有从失败中学到任何东西”
items.summary_zh: 由于主席杰罗姆·鲍威尔受到刑事调查，凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 的美联储主席提名一直悬而未决。

items.title: Man in Paris Accused of Attempted Attack on Bank of America
items.summary: Prosecutors say the police thwarted an attacker as he was trying to detonate explosives. The episode is being investigated as possible terrorism.
items.title_zh: 巴黎男子被指控企图袭击美国银行
items.summary_zh: 检察官称，当一名袭击者试图引爆爆炸物时，警方阻止了他。该事件正在作为可能的恐怖主义事件进行调查。

items.title: Canada proposes ban on crypto political donations in election integrity bill
items.summary: The bill follows years of warnings from Canada's election watchdog and comes one day after the U.K. announced a moratorium on political crypto donations.
items.title_zh: 加拿大提议在选举诚信法案中禁止加密政治捐款
items.summary_zh: 该法案是在加拿大选举监管机构多年来发出警告之后出台的，一天前英国宣布暂停政治加密货币捐赠。

items.title: Morgan Stanley sets spot bitcoin ETF fee at 0.14%, undercutting every rival on the market
items.summary: Bloomberg ETF analyst James Seyffart called the pricing a "big move" and predicted that the fund may launch in early April.
items.title_zh: 摩根士丹利将现货比特币 ETF 费用定为 0.14%，低于市场上所有竞争对手
items.summary_zh: 彭博 ETF 分析师 James Seyffart 称此次定价是“重大举措”，并预测该基金可能会在 4 月初推出。

items.title: California bars officials from prediction market insider betting as federal ban takes shape
items.summary: Prediction market platforms are tightening trading restrictions and surveillance tools as concerns grow over insider participants.
items.title_zh: 随着联邦禁令的形成，加州禁止官员进行预测市场内幕押注
items.summary_zh: 随着对内部参与者的担忧日益加剧，预测市场平台正在收紧交易限制和监控工具。

items.title: Strategy may have paused bitcoin accumulation last week, ending a thirteen week buying streak
items.summary: The company seemed to have skipped it's weekly bitcoin purchase announcement for the first time since late december.
items.title_zh: 上周策略可能暂停了比特币积累，结束了十三周的连续购买
items.summary_zh: 该公司似乎自 12 月底以来首次跳过了每周的比特币购买公告。

items.title: Crypto's CLARITY Act could be a headwind for DeFi tokens ring-fencing yield, analyst says
items.summary: The proposed restriction on yield would shift value toward regulated players and away from decentralized finance' tokens, 10x Research's Markus Thielen said.
items.title_zh: 分析师表示，加密货币的 CLARITY 法案可能会阻碍 DeFi 代币的收益率
items.summary_zh: 10x Research 的 Markus Thielen 表示，拟议的收益率限制将使价值转向受监管的参与者，而不是去中心化金融的代币。

items.title: MIT engineers design proteins by their motion, not just their shape
items.summary: An AI model generates novel proteins based on how they vibrate and move, opening new possibilities for dynamic biomaterials and adaptive therapeutics.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的工程师根据蛋白质的运动而不仅仅是形状来设计蛋白质
items.summary_zh: 人工智能模型根据蛋白质的振动和移动方式生成新型蛋白质，为动态生物材料和适应性治疗开辟了新的可能性。

items.title: Augmenting citizen science with computer vision for fish monitoring
items.summary: MIT Sea Grant works with the Woodwell Climate Research Center and other collaborators to demonstrate a deep learning-based system for fish monitoring.
items.title_zh: 通过鱼类监测的计算机视觉增强公民科学
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院海洋格兰特与伍德韦尔气候研究中心和其他合作者合作，展示了一种基于深度学习的鱼类监测系统。

items.title: World has 'never experienced' soaring refining margins like this, TotalEnergies CEO tells CNBC
items.summary: TotalEnergies CEO Patrick Pouyanné on the Iran war, the $1 billion deal with the White House, investment in the U.S., and more.
items.title_zh: TotalEnergies 首席执行官告诉 CNBC，世界“从未经历过”如此飙升的炼油利润
items.summary_zh: TotalEnergies 首席执行官 Patrick Pouyanné 谈论伊朗战争、与白宫达成的 10 亿美元协议、对美国的投资等。

items.title: Jamie Dimon says Iran war makes Middle East peace prospects better in the long term
items.summary: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon issued an optimistic viewpoint on Middle East peace, weeks into the war with Iran.
items.title_zh: 杰米·戴蒙表示，从长远来看，伊朗战争使中东和平前景更好
items.summary_zh: 在与伊朗的战争爆发几周后，摩根大通首席执行官杰米戴蒙对中东和平发表了乐观的看法。

items.title: Apollo gives investors only 45% of requested withdrawals from $15 billion private credit fund
items.summary: The withdrawals show that Apollo didn't avoid the rush of investor redemptions plaguing rivals, driven by concern over private credit loans to software firms.
items.title_zh: Apollo 仅向投资者提供 150 亿美元私人信贷基金提款请求的 45%
items.summary_zh: 这些撤资表明，由于对向软件公司提供私人信贷的担忧，阿波罗并没有避免困扰竞争对手的投资者赎回潮。

items.title: Jeremy Bowen: Trump is waging war based on instinct and it isn't working
items.summary: One month into the conflict in Iran, Trump's gut-instinct approach is not proving effective, writes the BBC's international editor.
items.title_zh: 杰里米·鲍文：特朗普基于本能发动战争，但行不通
items.summary_zh: 英国广播公司 (BBC) 国际编辑写道，伊朗冲突发生一个月后，事实证明，特朗普本能的做法并未奏效。

items.title: Three Lebanese journalists killed in Israeli strike, say broadcasters
items.summary: The Israeli military confirms it killed Ali Shoeib from the Hezbollah-affiliated Al Manar TV.
items.title_zh: 广播公司称，三名黎巴嫩记者在以色列袭击中丧生
items.summary_zh: 以色列军方证实击毙了真主党附属的 Al Manar 电视台的 Ali Shoeib。

items.title: Three arrested in Paris after attempted bomb attack outside Bank of America
items.summary: France's anti-terrorism prosecutor's office said it had immediately taken over the investigation.
items.title_zh: 三人在巴黎因美国银行外未遂炸弹袭击被捕
items.summary_zh: 法国反恐检察官办公室表示已立即接手调查。

items.title: Italy investigates Sephora and Benefit over marketing skincare to children
items.summary: The Italian Competition Authority said luxury goods giant LVMH appears to have adopted "particularly insidious" marketing strategies.
items.title_zh: 意大利调查丝芙兰和贝玲妃向儿童推销护肤品的行为
items.summary_zh: 意大利竞争管理局表示，奢侈品巨头路威酩轩集团似乎采取了“特别阴险”的营销策略。

items.title: Two Australian states offer free public transport as war pushes up fuel prices
items.summary: Victoria and Tasmania incentivise commuters not to drive as the Iran war causes the price of petrol to shoot up.
items.title_zh: 由于战争推高燃油价格，澳大利亚两个州提供免费公共交通
items.summary_zh: 由于伊朗战争导致汽油价格飙升，维多利亚州和塔斯马尼亚州鼓励通勤者不要开车。

items.title: Ukraine Finalizes Air Defense Deals With Gulf Nations Amid War in Mideast
items.summary: The Ukrainian president visited the Middle East, where he sought to shift his country from a recipient of military aid to a supplier.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰在中东战争中与海湾国家敲定防空协议
items.summary_zh: 乌克兰总统访问了中东，试图将乌克兰从军事援助的接受国转变为军事援助的提供国。

items.title: On Iran’s Rugged Frontier, Kurds Yearn to Join the Fight
items.summary: These groups’ dream has long been to establish federal autonomy, akin to that of their fellow Kurds in Iraq. With Iran’s leaders battered and degraded, they hope their moment has come.
items.title_zh: 在伊朗崎岖的边境上，库尔德人渴望加入战斗
items.summary_zh: 这些团体长期以来的梦想是建立联邦自治权，就像他们在伊拉克的库尔德同胞一样。随着伊朗领导人遭受重创和贬低，他们希望自己的时刻已经到来。

items.title: In Dubai, a famed horse race goes on, despite the war.
items.title_zh: 在迪拜，一场著名的赛马比赛仍在继续，尽管正值战争时期。

items.title: Halfway Through Lent, a Small Quebec Island Celebrates With Masks and Jigs
items.summary: Few islanders still observe Lent, but they cling to a tradition once seen as defying the all-powerful Roman Catholic Church.
items.title_zh: 四旬斋过半，魁北克小岛用面具和夹具庆祝
items.summary_zh: 很少有岛民仍然遵守四旬斋，但他们坚持曾经被视为反抗全能罗马天主教会的传统。

items.title: Stablecoin payments go 'invisible' in Southeast Asia as crypto card business surges
items.summary: StraitsX, a Singapore-based company, has seen rapid growth in its stablecoin card program, with a 40x surge in transaction volume and an 83x increase in card issuance between 2024 and 2025.
items.title_zh: 随着加密卡业务激增，稳定币支付在东南亚变得“隐形”
items.summary_zh: 总部位于新加坡的公司 StraitsX 的稳定币卡计划快速增长，2024 年至 2025 年间，交易量激增 40 倍，发卡量增加 83 倍。

items.title: No one is 100% happy with the stablecoin yield agreement: State of Crypto
items.summary: The crypto and banking industries saw Senators Alsobrooks and Tillis' agreement-in-principle for stablecoin yield.
items.title_zh: 没有人对稳定币收益率协议 100% 满意：State of Crypto
items.summary_zh: 加密货币和银行业见证了参议员 Alsobrooks 和 Tillis 就稳定币收益率达成的原则协议。

items.title: Sen. Warren targets Bitmain-Trump family ties in letter to Commerce Secretary Lutnick: Bloomberg
items.summary: The Department of Homeland Security has probed whether Bitmain's popular mining machines could be exploited for espionage or endanger the U.S. grid.
items.title_zh: 参议员沃伦在给商务部长卢特尼克的信中瞄准了比特大陆与特朗普的家族关系：彭博社
items.summary_zh: 美国国土安全部已调查比特大陆广受欢迎的矿机是否可能被用于间谍活动或危及美国电网。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #13.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Hyperliquid (HYPE)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 13。

items.title: Helping developers build safer AI experiences for teens
items.summary: OpenAI releases prompt-based teen safety policies for developers using gpt-oss-safeguard, helping moderate age-specific risks in AI systems.
items.title_zh: 帮助开发者为青少年打造更安全的人工智能体验
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 使用 gpt-oss-safeguard 为开发人员发布基于提示的青少年安全策略，帮助缓解 AI 系统中特定年龄的风险。

items.title: OpenAI to acquire Astral
items.summary: Accelerates Codex growth to power the next generation of Python developer tools
items.title_zh: OpenAI 收购 Astral
items.summary_zh: 加速 Codex 的发展，为下一代 Python 开发工具提供动力

items.title: Liberate your OpenClaw
items.title_zh: 解放你的 OpenClaw

items.title: AI system learns to keep warehouse robot traffic running smoothly
items.summary: This new approach adapts to decide which robots should get the right of way at every moment, avoiding congestion and increasing throughput.
items.title_zh: 人工智能系统学习保持仓库机器人交通平稳运行
items.summary_zh: 这种新方法可以随时决定哪些机器人应该获得通行权，从而避免拥堵并提高吞吐量。

items.title: Wristband enables wearers to control a robotic hand with their own movements
items.summary: By moving their hands and fingers, users can direct a robot to play piano or shoot a basketball, or they can manipulate objects in a virtual environment.
items.title_zh: 腕带使佩戴者能够通过自己的动作控制机械手
items.summary_zh: 通过移动他们的手和手指，用户可以指挥机器人弹钢琴或投篮球，或者他们可以操纵虚拟环境中的物体。

items.title: MIT and Hasso Plattner Institute establish collaborative hub for AI and creativity
items.summary: Jointly led by the MIT Morningside Academy for Design, MIT Schwarzman College of Computing, and the Hasso Plattner Institute in Potsdam, the hub will foster a dynamic community where computing, creativity, and human-centered innovation meet.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院和哈索普拉特纳研究所建立人工智能和创造力合作中心
items.summary_zh: 该中心由麻省理工学院晨兴设计学院、麻省理工学院施瓦茨曼计算学院和波茨坦哈索·普拉特纳研究所联合领导，将培育一个充满活力的社区，让计算、创造力和以人为本的创新相遇。

items.title: Recent Quant Links from Quantocracy as of 02/23/2026
items.summary: This is a summary of links recently featured on Quantocracy as of Monday, 02/23/2026. To see our most recent links, visit the Quant Mashup. Read on readers! Evaluating Reversal Potential in Niche Alternative ETFs [Quantpedia] Alternative ETFs sit at an unusual intersection of pub
items.title_zh: 截至 2026 年 2 月 23 日，来自 Quantocracy 的最新量化链接
items.summary_zh: 这是截至 2026 年 2 月 23 日星期一 Quantocracy 上最近推荐的链接的摘要。要查看我们最新的链接，请访问 Quant Mashup。请读者阅读！评估利基另类 ETF 的逆转潜力 [Quantpedia] 另类 ETF 位于酒吧的一个不寻常的交叉点

items.title: Bitcoin bullish bets hit a 28-month high on Bitfinex, and that's music to bears' ears
items.summary: Historically, spikes in Bitfinex BTC/USD longs have acted as a contrary indicator.
items.title_zh: Bitfinex 的比特币看涨押注创 28 个月新高，这对空头来说是个好消息
items.summary_zh: 从历史上看，Bitfinex BTC/USD 多头的飙升一直是一个相反的指标。

items.title: New Ethereum project aims to fix network fragmentation and improve user experience
items.summary: The project is designed to make Ethereum’s many layer 2s work together more seamlessly.
items.title_zh: 新的以太坊项目旨在修复网络碎片并改善用户体验
items.summary_zh: 该项目旨在使以太坊的许多第 2 层更加无缝地协同工作。

items.title: Inside Aave’s governance battle as DeFi giant prepares for upgrade
items.summary: In an interview with CoinDesk, Aave Labs CEO Stani Kulechov reflected on the governance debates in the Aave ecosystem, as well as what’s to come for the network.
items.title_zh: DeFi 巨头准备升级，Aave 的治理之争揭秘
items.summary_zh: 在接受 CoinDesk 采访时，Aave Labs 首席执行官 Stani Kulechov 反思了 Aave 生态系统中的治理争论，以及该网络的未来发展。

items.title: Gnosis and Zisk announce ‘Ethereum Economic Zone’ rollup framework with Ethereum Foundation co-funding
items.summary: The Ethereum Foundation is co-funding the "easy" initiative, which was announced at EthCC in Cannes, and partners include Aave, Titan, Centrifuge, and more.
items.title_zh: Gnosis 和 Zisk 宣布与以太坊基金会共同资助的“以太坊经济区”汇总框架
items.summary_zh: 以太坊基金会正在共同资助“easy”计划，该计划在戛纳 EthCC 上宣布，合作伙伴包括 Aave、Titan、Centrifuge 等。

items.title: Ethereum Foundation mandate sparks debate over loyalty pledges, Milady-inspired branding
items.summary: "The issue is whether or not people support CROPS and going in that direction, the issue is how the EF is going about it,” Optimism's Mark Tyneway said.
items.title_zh: 以太坊基金会的授权引发了关于忠诚承诺和受米拉迪启发的品牌的争论
items.summary_zh: “问题在于人们是否支持 CROPS 并朝这个方向发展，问题在于 EF 将如何实现这一目标，”Optimism 的马克·泰恩威 (Mark Tyneway) 说道。

items.title: Inside our approach to the Model Spec
items.summary: Learn how OpenAI’s Model Spec serves as a public framework for model behavior, balancing safety, user freedom, and accountability as AI systems advance.
items.title_zh: 深入了解我们的模型规格方法
items.summary_zh: 了解 OpenAI 的模型规范如何作为模型行为的公共框架，随着人工智能系统的进步，平衡安全性、用户自由和责任。

items.title: Introducing the OpenAI Safety Bug Bounty program
items.summary: OpenAI launches a Safety Bug Bounty program to identify AI abuse and safety risks, including agentic vulnerabilities, prompt injection, and data exfiltration.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 安全漏洞赏金计划简介
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出安全漏洞赏金计划，以识别人工智能滥用和安全风险，包括代理漏洞、提示注入和数据泄露。

items.title: Update on the OpenAI Foundation
items.summary: The OpenAI Foundation announces plans to invest at least $1 billion in curing diseases, economic opportunity, AI resilience, and community programs.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 基金会的最新动态
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 基金会宣布计划投资至少 10 亿美元用于治疗疾病、经济机会、人工智能复原力和社区项目。

items.title: Creating with Sora Safely
items.summary: To address the novel safety challenges posed by a state-of-the-art video model as well as a new social creation platform, we’ve built Sora 2 and the Sora app with safety at the foundation. Our approach is anchored in concrete protections.
items.title_zh: 与 Sora 一起安全地创作
items.summary_zh: 为了解决最先进的视频模型和新的社交创作平台带来的新的安全挑战，我们构建了以安全为基础的 Sora 2 和 Sora 应用程序。我们的方法以具体的保护为基础。

items.title: Build a Domain-Specific Embedding Model in Under a Day
items.title_zh: 在一天之内构建特定领域的嵌入模型

items.title: Build with Lyria 3, our newest music generation model
items.summary: Lyria 3 is now available in paid preview through the Gemini API and for testing in Google AI Studio.
items.title_zh: 使用我们最新的音乐生成模型 Lyria 3 进行构建
items.summary_zh: Lyria 3 现已通过 Gemini API 提供付费预览版，并可在 Google AI Studio 中进行测试。

items.title: Advancing international trade research and finding community
items.summary: Sojun Park, a postdoc at the Center for International Studies, has learned much from his research on intellectual property as well as his interactions with students and mentors at MIT.
items.title_zh: 推进国际贸易研究和寻找社区
items.summary_zh: Sojun Park 是国际研究中心的博士后，他从知识产权研究以及与麻省理工学院学生和导师的互动中学到了很多东西。

items.title: On algorithms, life, and learning
items.summary: Operations research expert Dimitris Bertsimas delivered the annual Killian Lecture, providing a look at the past and future of his work.
items.title_zh: 论算法、生活、学习
items.summary_zh: 运筹学专家 Dimitris Bertsimas 发表了年度基利安讲座，回顾了他工作的过去和未来。

items.title: As stocks and bonds fall, and oil hits $100, a futures trade that boomed in 2022 may again be a winner
items.summary: Managed futures, which track macro themes expected to play out over months, do well when traditional assets are falling. This could be one of those times.
items.title_zh: 随着股票和债券下跌，油价触及 100 美元，2022 年蓬勃发展的期货交易可能再次成为赢家
items.summary_zh: 管理期货跟踪预计将在数月内显现的宏观主题，在传统资产下跌时表现良好。这可能是其中之一。

items.title: Why one hedge fund veteran is urging investors to 'prepare for the worst'
items.summary: DBi's Andrew Beer suggests the market's crystal ball is broken.
items.title_zh: 为什么一位对冲基金资深人士敦促投资者“为最坏的情况做好准备”
items.summary_zh: DBi 的安德鲁·比尔 (Andrew Beer) 表示，市场的水晶球已经破碎。

items.title: Former SEC Chair Jay Clayton says regulators would scrutinize trading ahead of Trump post
items.summary: "Any move like that in advance of any announcement, the regulators are going to look at," said Clayton, former SEC chair.
items.title_zh: 美国证券交易委员会前主席杰伊·克莱顿表示，监管机构将在特朗普上任之前审查交易
items.summary_zh: 美国证券交易委员会前主席克莱顿表示：“在任何公告之前，监管机构都会关注任何此类举措。”

items.title: Moody's cuts rating on private credit fund run by KKR and Future Standard to junk as bad loans grow
items.summary: The move by Moody's is the latest sign of distress in private credit; retail investors have been rushing to withdraw funds, from Blackstone to Apollo.
items.title_zh: 由于不良贷款增加，穆迪将 KKR 和未来标准运营的私人信贷基金评级下调至垃圾级
items.summary_zh: 穆迪此举是私人信贷陷入困境的最新迹象。散户投资者纷纷撤资，从黑石到阿波罗。

items.title: Iranian attacks across Gulf continue as major industrial sites hit
items.summary: A number of people are said to have been injured after attacks on aluminium sites in the UAE and Bahrain.
items.title_zh: 随着主要工业基地遭到袭击，伊朗在海湾地区的袭击仍在继续
items.summary_zh: 据称，阿联酋和巴林的铝厂遭遇袭击，造成多人受伤。

items.title: Israeli police block Latin Patriarch from Palm Sunday mass in Jerusalem
items.summary: The move drew criticism from the church, global leaders and the US ambassador. Israel's PM said it was a safety measure following recent Iranian strikes.
items.title_zh: 以色列警方阻止拉丁宗主教参加耶路撒冷圣枝主日弥撒
items.summary_zh: 此举招致教会、全球领导人和美国大使的批评。以色列总理表示，这是伊朗最近发动袭击后采取的一项安全措施。

items.title: Renoir, Cézanne and Matisse paintings stolen in Italian job
items.summary: The paintings were taken from a museum in Parma by four masked men in the middle of the night, police say.
items.title_zh: 雷诺阿、塞尚和马蒂斯的画作在意大利工作中被盗
items.summary_zh: 警方称，这些画是半夜被四名蒙面男子从帕尔马的一家博物馆拿走的。

items.title: African football chief resigns following row over Morocco-Senegal final
items.summary: Veron Mosengo-Omba, a controversial figure, leaves at a turbulent time for African football.
items.title_zh: 非洲足协主席在摩洛哥与塞内加尔决赛发生争执后辞职
items.summary_zh: 贝隆·莫森戈-翁巴是一位颇具争议的人物，他在非洲足球的动荡时期离开。

items.title: Canada's New Democratic Party elects Avi Lewis as its leader
items.summary: Avi Lewis's campaign platform focused on revitalising the struggling left-leaning party and prioritising workers' rights.
items.title_zh: 加拿大新民主党选举阿维·刘易斯为党魁
items.summary_zh: 阿维·刘易斯的竞选纲领重点是振兴苦苦挣扎的左倾政党并优先考虑工人权利。

items.title: U.S. to Allow Russian Oil Tanker to Reach Cuba, Breaking Blockade
items.summary: The tanker full of crude oil could reach its expected destination by Tuesday, providing a lifeline to the island amid intense U.S. pressure.
items.title_zh: 美国允许俄罗斯油轮抵达古巴，打破封锁
items.summary_zh: 这艘满载原油的油轮可能会在周二抵达预期目的地，在美国的巨大压力下为该岛提供生命线。

items.title: A Toothless Iran? Missile and Drone Strikes Show It Can Still Inflict Pain.
items.summary: A wave of strikes across the Middle East in recent days shows that Iran has not lost the capacity to retaliate.
items.title_zh: 无牙伊朗？导弹和​​无人机袭击表明它仍然可以造成痛苦。
items.summary_zh: 近几日中东地区的一波袭击潮表明，伊朗并未丧失报复能力。

items.title: Can Canada’s Left Regroup? A New Leader Will Try.
items.summary: Seeking a comeback after voters flocked to Mark Carney’s Liberals, the New Democrats picked Avi Lewis, a scion of a leftist political dynasty.
items.title_zh: 加拿大左翼能否重组？新领导者将尝试。
items.summary_zh: 在选民涌向马克·卡尼领导的自由党后，新民主党寻求卷土重来，选择了左翼政治王朝的后裔阿维·刘易斯。

items.title: The Slum in Gangnam, the Richest Part of Seoul
items.summary: The city wants to redevelop a shantytown in Gangnam district, where hundreds are defying eviction, fighting for a right to own a home in an area notorious for the exorbitant cost of housing.
items.title_zh: 首尔最富有的地区江南的贫民窟
items.summary_zh: 该市希望重建江南区的一个棚户区，那里有数百人不顾驱逐，争取在一个因住房成本过高而臭名昭著的地区拥有住房的权利。

items.title: XRP tests $1.33 as rising leverage and weak price action create unstable setup
items.summary: Funding spikes and liquidations point to positioning build-up, with direction hinging on whether buyers can defend support.
items.title_zh: XRP 测试 1.33 美元，杠杆率上升和价格走势疲软造成不稳定的设置
items.summary_zh: 资金激增和清算表明头寸增加，方向取决于买家能否捍卫支撑。

items.title: Bittensor ecosystem tokens' value hit $1.5 billion as Jensen Huang endorsement supports TAO rally
items.summary: The ecosystem's smaller tokens are acting as leveraged bets on TAO, with multiple subnet tokens posting 200-400% monthly gains.
items.title_zh: 黄仁勋背书支持 TAO 反弹，Bittensor 生态系统代币价值突破 15 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 该生态系统中较小的代币正在充当 TAO 的杠杆赌注，多个子网代币每月收益达 200-400%。

items.title: Lido DAO proposes $20 million one-off LDO buyback as token hovers near all-time low
items.summary: At current prices of ether and LDO, which are both in the slumps, the buyback could absorb around 8.5% of LDO's circulating supply.
items.title_zh: 由于代币徘徊在历史最低点附近，Lido DAO 提议一次性 2000 万美元回购 LDO
items.summary_zh: 按照目前以太坊和 LDO 的价格均处于低迷状态，回购可能会吸收 LDO 流通供应量的 8.5% 左右。

items.title: World Foundation subsidiary sells $65 million in WLD tokens through OTC deals as token hits all-time low
items.summary: WLD hit a new all-time low of about $0.24 on Saturday, down roughly 97% from its March 2024 peak near $11.82, though it rebounded on the news.
items.title_zh: 世界基金会子公司通过场外交易出售 6500 万美元的 WLD 代币，代币触及历史新低
items.summary_zh: 周六，WLD 触及约 0.24 美元的历史新低，较 2024 年 3 月接近 11.82 美元的峰值下跌约 97%，但消息公布后有所反弹。

items.title: ‘What the hell?’ — Crypto frustration boils over as stablecoin fight stalls bill
items.summary: Frustrations are continuing to boil over in the crypto industry as it finds itself again at an impasse over the treatment of stablecoins.
items.title_zh: “到底是什么？”——随着稳定币之争拖延法案，加密货币的挫败感沸腾了
items.summary_zh: 加密行业的挫败感继续沸腾，因为它发现自己在稳定币的处理问题上再次陷入僵局。

items.title: Ripple CEO Garlinghouse touts ‘record’ Q1, cautions against policy weaponization derailing progress
items.summary: Largely optimistic the CLARITY Act will be passed, Brad Garlinghouse revised his prediction for when the legislation with be finalized.
items.title_zh: Ripple首席执行官加林豪斯吹捧第一季度“创纪录”，警告不要政策武器化破坏进展
items.summary_zh: 布拉德·加林豪斯 (Brad Garlinghouse) 对《清晰法案》的通过非常乐观，他修改了对立法何时最终确定的预测。

items.title: STADLER reshapes knowledge work at a 230-year-old company
items.summary: Learn how STADLER uses ChatGPT to transform knowledge work, saving time and accelerating productivity across 650 employees.
items.title_zh: STADLER 重塑一家拥有 230 年历史的公司的知识工作
items.summary_zh: 了解 STADLER 如何使用 ChatGPT 来转变知识工作，从而节省 650 名员工的时间并提高工作效率。

items.title: Powering product discovery in ChatGPT
items.summary: ChatGPT introduces richer, visually immersive shopping powered by the Agentic Commerce Protocol, enabling product discovery, side-by-side comparisons, and merchant integration.
items.title_zh: 推动 ChatGPT 中的产品发现
items.summary_zh: ChatGPT 引入了由 Agentic Commerce Protocol 支持的更丰富、视觉沉浸式购物，从而实现产品发现、并排比较和商家集成。

items.title: How we monitor internal coding agents for misalignment
items.summary: How OpenAI uses chain-of-thought monitoring to study misalignment in internal coding agents—analyzing real-world deployments to detect risks and strengthen AI safety safeguards.
items.title_zh: 我们如何监控内部编码代理的错位
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 如何使用思想链监控来研究内部编码代理的错位——分析现实世界的部署以检测风险并加强人工智能安全保障。

items.title: OpenAI Japan announces Japan Teen Safety Blueprint to put teen safety first
items.summary: OpenAI Japan announces the Japan Teen Safety Blueprint, introducing stronger age protections, parental controls, and well-being safeguards for teens using generative AI.
items.title_zh: OpenAI Japan 宣布日本青少年安全蓝图，将青少年安全放在首位
items.summary_zh: OpenAI Japan 宣布了日本青少年安全蓝图，为使用生成人工智能的青少年引入了更强有力的年龄保护、家长控制和福祉保障。

items.title: A New Framework for Evaluating Voice Agents (EVA)
items.title_zh: 评估语音代理 (EVA) 的新框架

items.title: What's New in Mellea 0.4.0 + Granite Libraries Release
items.title_zh: Mellea 0.4.0 + Granite 库版本的新增功能

items.title: State of Open Source on Hugging Face: Spring 2026
items.title_zh: 拥抱开源的现状：2026 年春季

items.title: Holotron-12B - High Throughput Computer Use Agent
items.title_zh: Holotron-12B - 高吞吐量计算机使用代理

items.title: Introducing Storage Buckets on the Hugging Face Hub
items.title_zh: Hugging Face Hub 上引入存储桶

items.title: Keep the Tokens Flowing: Lessons from 16 Open-Source RL Libraries
items.title_zh: 保持代币流动：来自 16 个开源 RL 库的经验教训

items.title: Ulysses Sequence Parallelism: Training with Million-Token Contexts
items.title_zh: Ulysses 序列并行性：使用百万令牌上下文进行训练

items.title: LeRobot v0.5.0: Scaling Every Dimension
items.title_zh: 乐机器人 v0.5.0：扩展各个维度

items.title: Watch James Manyika talk AI and creativity with LL COOL J.
items.summary: In the latest episode of our Dialogues on Technology and Society series, LL COOL J sits down with James Manyika.
items.title_zh: 观看 James Manyika 与 LL COOL J 谈论人工智能和创造力。
items.summary_zh: 在我们的技术与社会对话系列的最新一集中，LL COOL J 与 James Manyika 进行了访谈。

items.title: Transform your headphones into a live personal translator on iOS.
items.summary: Google Translate’s Live translate with headphones is officially arriving on iOS! And we're expanding the capability for both iOS and Android users to even more countries…
items.title_zh: 将您的耳机变成 iOS 上的实时个人翻译器。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌翻译的耳机实时翻译功能正式登陆 iOS！我们正在将 iOS 和 Android 用户的功能扩展到更多国家/地区……

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live: Making audio AI more natural and reliable
items.summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live is now available across Google products.
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live：让音频AI更加自然可靠
items.summary_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live 现已在 Google 产品中提供。

items.title: Search Live is expanding globally
items.summary: We’re expanding Search Live globally, to all languages and locations where AI Mode is available.
items.title_zh: Search Live 正在全球扩张
items.summary_zh: 我们正在全球范围内将 Search Live 扩展到支持 AI 模式的所有语言和地点。

items.title: Lyria 3 Pro: Create longer tracks in more Google products
items.summary: We are bringing Lyria 3 to the tools where professionals work and create every day.
items.title_zh: Lyria 3 Pro：在更多 Google 产品中创建更长的曲目
items.summary_zh: 我们将 Lyria 3 引入专业人士每天工作和创作的工具中。

items.title: Bringing the power of Personal Intelligence to more people
items.summary: We're expanding Personal Intelligence across AI Mode in Search, the Gemini app and Gemini in Chrome.
items.title_zh: 将个人智能的力量带给更多人
items.summary_zh: 我们正在将个人智能扩展到搜索中的 AI 模式、Gemini 应用程序和 Chrome 中的 Gemini。

items.title: Our latest investment in open source security for the AI era
items.summary: Google is making new investments, building new tools and developing code security to improve open source security.
items.title_zh: 我们对人工智能时代开源安全的最新投资
items.summary_zh: 谷歌正在进行新的投资、构建新的工具并开发代码安全性，以提高开源安全性。

items.title: How AI is helping improve heart health in rural Australia
items.summary: A new Google AI initiative aims to improve heart health outcomes for people living in remote Australian communities.
items.title_zh: 人工智能如何帮助改善澳大利亚农村地区的心脏健康
items.summary_zh: 一项新的谷歌人工智能计划旨在改善生活在澳大利亚偏远社区的人们的心脏健康状况。

items.title: Gemini in Google Sheets just achieved state-of-the-art performance.
items.summary: Today we announced new beta features for Gemini in Sheets to help you create, organize and edit entire sheets, from basic tasks to complex data analysis — just describe …

items.title: Seeing sounds
items.summary: Mariano Salcedo ’25, a master’s student in the new Music Technology and Computation Graduate Program, is designing an AI to visualize and express music and other sounds.
items.title_zh: 看到声音
items.summary_zh: Mariano Salcedo ' 25 是新音乐技术和计算研究生项目的硕士生，正在设计一种人工智能来可视化和表达音乐和其他声音。

items.title: How to create “humble” AI
items.summary: An MIT-led team is designing artificial intelligence systems for medical diagnosis that are more collaborative and forthcoming about uncertainty.
items.title_zh: 如何创造“谦逊”的人工智能
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院领导的团队正在设计用于医疗诊断的人工智能系统，该系统对于不确定性更具协作性和主动性。

items.title: What’s the right path for AI?
items.summary: Conference speakers discussed the unfolding trajectory of AI and the benefits of shaping technology to meet people’s needs.
items.title_zh: AI的正确道路是什么？
items.summary_zh: 会议发言人讨论了人工智能的发展轨迹以及塑造技术以满足人们需求的好处。
